description_long: This is a modern bullpup-style assault rifle with a compact, angular body and a camouflage-patterned finish. The rifle features a prominent integrated scope mounted on top, providing enhanced aiming capabilities. Its magazine is positioned behind the trigger assembly, characteristic of bullpup designs, and appears to be a detachable box type. The barrel is relatively short and slender, extending forward from the main body, with no visible muzzle device attached. The stock is integrated into the main body, forming a continuous, ergonomic shape with a thumbhole grip. The overall appearance suggests a tactical firearm suitable for urban combat scenarios.
description: A compact, camouflage bullpup assault rifle with an integrated scope and detachable box magazine, designed for tactical use.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the integrated scope, camouflage body, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel's end and the narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bullpup configuration, scope, and magazine placement.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stock's back and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
